name: image2slides
description: Generate editable PowerPoint decks from image-generated slide compositions and text-free backgrounds.

interface.shortDescription: Turn image-generated slide comps into editable PPTX decks
interface.longDescription: Image2Slides guides Codex through a visual-first slide workflow: capture required deck intent, build a wiki knowledge structure, separate grep-required facts from generative content, create completed slide images with GPT-image-2, derive matching text-free backgrounds, analyze text/blank regions, assemble editable PowerPoint text over background masters, and verify against the completed reference images.
defaultPrompt: /image2slides Create a 16:9 academic talk deck with a cool blue medical style.
/image2slides Build an enterprise showcase deck from my provided materials.
